name: Shared expense entry form for add/edit with VND amount normalization
description: Unify add-expense and edit-expense on one canonical shared form, preserve the approved add-expense row UI, normalize field/control code structure, and make VND thousand-shortcut amount mapping symmetric for create and edit.

evidence.description: Proposed design doc defines the shared add/edit expense-entry form, locked UI preservation rule, canonical create/edit field set, code normalization boundaries, and symmetric VND amount mapping requirements.
Design docs index now links the new proposed expense-entry unification design.
Progress log records user-approved direction and next-step planning for the expense-entry unification work.
Canonical shared row-based expense entry UI now serves both add-expense and edit-expense with the locked 7-field layout.
Shared expense entry hook now owns create/edit state, validation, VND hydration, create submit, and edit submit behavior.
Edit expense page now renders the canonical shared expense-entry form and uses the same group/category option logic as the add dialog.
Focused VND amount tests verify display/submit symmetry and reverse hydration from stored minor values.
Focused shared-hook tests verify create defaults, edit hydration, validation, private/household payloads, and update payload wiring.
Focused helper tests verify expense-only category filtering and merged personal/household group option behavior.
Final full repository verification passed after the shared expense-entry unification and cleanup work.
